content.body: in https://tc39.es/proposal-temporal/#sec-temporal-interprettemporaldatetimefields.- it calls RegulateTime with the time fields off of `fields`. RegulateTime asserts it can only receive an integer. but `fields` (https://tc39.es/proposal-temporal/#sec-temporal-calendar-fields-records ) can be `~UNSET~`, which is not an integer. this seems like a temporal spec bug. can someone confirm?
content.formatted_body: in https://tc39.es/proposal-temporal/#sec-temporal-interprettemporaldatetimefields.- it calls RegulateTime with the time fields off of fields. RegulateTime asserts it can only receive an integer. but fields (https://tc39.es/proposal-temporal/#sec-temporal-calendar-fields-records ) can be ~UNSET~, which is not an integer. this seems like a temporal spec bug. can someone confirm?
